cards.title: Randomness Specification
cards.governance_note: Document randomized step, distribution, seed, generator, sample frame, and trial plan.

cards.title: Uncertainty and Bounds
cards.governance_note: Report error probability, confidence interval, variance, tail behavior, amplification, and sample adequacy.

cards.title: Seed and Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve seed logs, trial records, sampled evidence, generator versions, and multi-seed sensitivity checks.
